ops.title: daemon-scrubs-claude-code-env
ops.body:
The cc-orchestrate daemon is routinely booted from inside a Claude Code session (a parent session drives cco over MCP), so its environ inherits CLAUDECODE=1, CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION=1, CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID=<parent>, CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT=cli. Every backend server and pane the daemon spawns inherits that env (backend/exec.go execRunner never sets c.Env). A spawned `claude` child that sees CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION/CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID does not persist a top-level transcript jsonl, which starves orchestrate's transcript tailer (tokens stuck at 0 forever) — reproduced on zellij/herd/cmux; tmux/superset escaped only because those backends set their own server env.

Fix: `orchestrate/serve.go` `serve()` calls `scrubClaudeCodeEnv()` first thing, which unsets every env var named exactly CLAUDECODE or prefixed CLAUDE_CODE_ (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is a different prefix and is left alone).
